name: Hello Cytoscape World App
author: Cytoscape Core Team
description: Reference app demonstrating core App API patterns: visual style editing, selection tracking / clearing, async layout execution, app lifecycle hooks, and both component-scoped and app-scoped event handling.

name: Network Workflow Examples
author: Cytoscape Core Team
description: Network creation, CX2 import, and external integration examples.

name: Network Statistics
author: Cytoscape Core Team
description: Logs network topology statistics (density, degree distribution, roots, leaves) to the browser console on every network switch. A non-React example using only mount/unmount lifecycle hooks.

name: Claude Bridge
author: Cytoscape Core Team
description: Displays a live log of commands sent by Claude Code via the MCP bridge server.
